# dokploy_discord_notification (Resource)

A Discord notification configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "dokploy_discord_notification" "alerts" {
  name        = "production-alerts"
  webhook_url = var.discord_webhook
  decoration  = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name.
- `webhook_url` (String, Sensitive) Discord webhook URL.

### Optional

- `app_build_error` (Boolean) Notify on build error.
- `app_deploy` (Boolean) Notify on application deploy.
- `database_backup` (Boolean) Notify on database backup events.
- `decoration` (Boolean) Enable emoji decoration.
- `docker_cleanup` (Boolean) Notify on Docker cleanup.
- `dokploy_backup` (Boolean) Notify on Dokploy self-backup events.
- `dokploy_restart` (Boolean) Notify on Dokploy restart.
- `server_threshold` (Boolean) Notify on server resource threshold breaches.
- `volume_backup` (Boolean) Notify on volume backup events.

### Read-Only

- `discord_id` (String) Discord-specific sub-ID used for updates.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import dokploy_discord_notification.alerts <notificationId>
```
